document_meta.title: GIL CLINIC — GHOS V2 Project Status Report

art_direction.design_rationale: Healthcare-calme aesthetic with minimal palette and analogous blue-grey harmony. Clean, professional, trustworthy — appropriate for a hospital management system status report. Museum-inspired cover with centered composition.

components.markdown_content:
**Phase 0 (Foundation)** — Complete at 100%. Identity, Patient, Queue, Experience, and Clinic layers built across 270+ Python files.

**Phase 1 (Department Pilot)** — Currently at 8%. Reception Dashboard (M1) complete. Technician Workspace (M2) in active development. 10 remaining modules planned through August 2026.

**Phases 2–12** — Scheduled through 2027, covering Clinical Reports, Appointments, Communication, Billing, Inventory, Laboratory, HR, Finance, Analytics, and AI.

### Complete (100%)
- **M1 — Reception Dashboard**: Search, Register, Queue, Token, Print Slip, Reports, Dept Status

### In Progress
- **M2 — Technician Workspace (40%)**: Call, Start, Complete, Timer, Notes, 5 departments
- **M5 — Patient PWA (25%)**: QR Login, Live Status, Hindi/English, Feedback
- **M6 — TV Display (25%)**: Queue Display, Dept Rotation, Voice Calling, Alerts

### Pending (0%)
- M3: Doctor Workspace · M4: Manager Dashboard · M7: Patient Timeline
- M8: Report Workflow · M9: Settings UI · M10: Audit Log Viewer
- M11: Error Recovery · M12: Integration Test & Release

### Project Timeline
- **Phase 0 ✅** — Foundation Complete (270+ Python files)
- **Phase 1 🔴** — Department Pilot, Jul–Aug 2026 (12 Modules)
- **Phases 2–6** — Clinical Reports, Appointments, Billing, Inventory (Sep–Dec 2026)
- **Phases 7–12** — Laboratory, HR, Finance, Analytics, AI Platform (2027)

### Key Technical Facts
- **270+ Python files** in foundation layer
- **6 PWA templates**: TV Display, Technician, Reception, Doctor, Patient Login, Patient Status
- **8 dynamic services**: ECG, Echo, TMT, Holter, ABPM, OPD, X-Ray, Ultrasound
- **Stack**: FastAPI + Clean Architecture + DDD
- **Database**: SQLite (PostgreSQL ready)
- **UI**: PWA (HTML/CSS/JS) — No Streamlit
- **Storage**: JSON backup with atomic writes + crash recovery
